revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Initial fees allocated between training (stand-alone selling price, recognized ratably as services rendered) and IP access (residual, recognized straight-line over FA/MFA term)
revenue_recognition.royalties: Sales-based royalties recognized as franchisee sales occur (variable consideration related to IP access)
revenue_recognition.brand_marketing_fund: Recognized gross (franchisor acts as principal). Sales-based royalties related to IP access, recognized as franchisee sales occur. Costs accrued up to revenue when fees exceed expenses.
revenue_recognition.fees_from_other_services: Recognized when services are rendered (single performance obligation)

accounts_receivable.method: Stated at amount expected to collect. Allowance for doubtful accounts based on collective assessment of similar risk characteristics. Historical losses adjusted for current and forecasted conditions.

intangible_assets.composition: Franchise relationships and master franchise agreements acquired in common control transaction
intangible_assets.valuation: Recorded at carrying values on date assigned (common control = no step-up)
intangible_assets.amortization_method: Straight-line over original estimated useful lives
intangible_assets.impairment_method: Comparison of carrying amount to estimated future undiscounted net cash flows. If less, impairment = fair value minus carrying value.

income_taxes.entity_classification: Disregarded entity for income tax purposes (single-member LLC)
income_taxes.provision: None — all income/loss reported on member's (parent's) tax return

advertising.notes: These are franchisor's own advertising costs, separate from brand marketing fund disbursements

variable_interest_entities.assessment: Nonpublic company exemption applied for common control arrangements including leasing arrangements. Related parties (Note 5) meet conditions under ASU 2018-17 and are not consolidated.

events.description: Asset purchase agreement with third party to acquire certain assets and assume certain liabilities of seller's franchise operations (Gong Cha brand). Total consideration approximately $3.6 million, payable in cash at closing, subject to post-closing adjustment.

license_agreement.fee: Percentage of total franchise fees and royalties earned (waived if net income below $250,000)

service_agreement.term: 10 years, auto-renews until both parties agree to terminate
service_agreement.purpose: Grow Gong Cha stores through marketing and operations-focused initiatives
service_agreement.receivable_at_dec2023: Overpayment of $190,449 included in Due from related parties

common_control_transaction.description: Assignment and assumption of master and unit franchise agreements from Licensor
common_control_transaction.treatment: Common control transaction — transferred at carrying amounts prospectively
common_control_transaction.loan_receivable: Recorded for net liabilities assumed; repaid by Licensor during 2023

due_from_parent.description: Ordinary course advances. 2024 balance relates to service fee overpayment. No interest. Unsecured. No specific repayment terms. Management does not expect settlement within next year.

due_from_affiliates.description: Royalties and brand marketing fund fees from commonly-owned stores

concentration_of_credit_risk.cash: May exceed FDIC limits at times; placed with major financial institution

contingencies.litigation: May be involved in ordinary routine litigation. Management believes no material adverse effect. Subject to inherent uncertainties.

franchised_outlets_note.notes: Difference between Note 3 (12 unit franchises) and Item 20 (4 direct franchised + 198 subfranchised) explained by the unit franchise count including subfranchises acquired from master franchisees
